title: Create Deco fixed window crafts.
description: Fixes broken create deco window crafts.
body:
# The issue has been fixed in newer Create Deco versions!

## Fixes broken (due to empty tag) window(s) craft recipes.

Following recipes were added:
```
createdeco:andesite_window
createdeco:copper_window
createdeco:iron_window
createdeco:industrial_iron_window
createdeco:brass_window
createdeco:zinc_window
```

This datapack will become deprecated, once the [issue](https://github.com/talrey/CreateDeco/issues/106) is fixed. Alternatively, I suggest using something like KubeJS for more elegant fix, since i did the "brute-force" way by just adding alternative recipes.
